title: Namib Desert Star Dunes at Twilight
prompt: A sweeping photorealistic landscape of the Namib Desert's towering star dunes at twilight, their sinuous ridgelines casting deep violet and amber shadows as the last light fades. The sky transitions from deep indigo overhead to a warm burnt-orange horizon, with the first stars of the night emerging through the haze. A lone oryx silhouette stands atop a dune crest, adding a sense of solitary grandeur to the vast, silent desert.

title: Midnight Sun Window Stretch Lofoten Rorbu
prompt: A young solo female model with long blonde hair and Korean appearance stands in a gentle full-body stretch inside a traditional Norwegian rorbu fishermen's cabin, arms raised gracefully above her head with fingertips barely touching the rain-specked floor-to-ceiling glass window, captured in a clean side profile. Beyond the glass, the breathtaking Lofoten archipelago midnight sun panorama unfolds — jagged snow-dusted granite peaks rise from mirror-still fjord waters glowing in warm amber and rose hues, with traditional red and yellow rorbuer cabins dotting the rocky shoreline. The low midnight sun streams through the glass from the left, bathing her in the same warm golden-amber directional light as the landscape outside — creating a luminous rim light in her blonde hair, casting long soft shadows across the rustic wooden cabin interior floor, and matching the color temperature of the fjord scene perfectly. Water droplets on the glass catch the golden light, creating delicate bokeh spots between her silhouette and the panoramic view. Shot on an 85mm lens, fine art portrait style, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic, photorealistic.
